since_last: 31% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.19%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -0.29% · Gold -0.96% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 31% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.19%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.19%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.24%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at -9.79%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +8.26%, INTU +3.81%, NOW +2.52%, META +2.52%, EQIX +2.41%. Laggards: INTC -9.79%, AMBA -9.70%, TER -8.29%, AVAV -7.73%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.73% at $151.22
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.73% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
